options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal_level
options.description: Vault level required to complete the Archipelago goal. Not included if goal type isn't [Goal Level].

options.name: goal_type
options.description: Win condition for this Vault Hunters world.

options.name: archipela_bits_chance
options.description: Percent chance for a normal vault chest to produce Archipela-bits.

options.name: lock_specializations
options.description: Whether ability specializations require Archipelago unlock items.

options.name: max_xp_scaling
options.description: Highest progressive XP multiplier included in the item pool.

options.name: max_loot_scaling
options.description: Highest progressive loot multiplier included in the item pool.

options.name: start_with_vault_kit
options.description: Start with iron gear, raw chromatic iron, vault stone, and a vault altar.

options.name: checks_behind_skills
options.description: When enabled, learning VH skills, talents, mods, and expertises creates Archipelago location checks. Cannot be enabled with Auto Learn Skills.

options.name: auto_learn_skills
options.description: When enabled, received VH skill, talent, mod, and expertise unlocks are automatically purchased or researched in-game. Cannot be enabled with Checks Behind Skills.

options.name: progressive_level_cap_size
options.description: Levels unlocked by each Progressive Level Cap. -1 uses the original milestone caps.

options.name: death_link
options.description: Share deaths with other DeathLink-enabled Archipelago players.

options.name: death_link_vaults_only
options.description: Only send and receive DeathLinks while the player is inside a vault.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Trinket: Picture of a Lucky Goose

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: Trinket: Picture of a Lucky Goose

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: Trinket: Picture of a Lucky Goose

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
